records.title: Pay-if-paid condition precedent
records.plain_english: If the owner never pays, you may never get paid.
records.why_it_matters: This family is frequently outcome-determinative in construction and design-build negotiations and should be shown in the demo.
records.pushback_one_liner: Please revise this section to align with a balanced design-build benchmark rather than an aggressive downstream transfer of risk.

records.title: Pay-when-paid with outside backstop
records.plain_english: Payment may wait briefly on owner funds, but a fixed outside deadline still protects you.
records.why_it_matters: This family is frequently outcome-determinative in construction and design-build negotiations and should be shown in the demo.
records.pushback_one_liner: Please revise this section to align with a balanced design-build benchmark rather than an aggressive downstream transfer of risk.

records.title: Retainage tied to project closeout
records.plain_english: A portion of earned money is withheld until total project closeout instead of your own completion.
records.why_it_matters: This family is frequently outcome-determinative in construction and design-build negotiations and should be shown in the demo.
records.pushback_one_liner: Please revise this section to align with a balanced design-build benchmark rather than an aggressive downstream transfer of risk.

records.title: Open-ended setoff or backcharge rights
records.plain_english: The contractor can deduct disputed amounts from current payments and hit cash immediately.
records.why_it_matters: This family is frequently outcome-determinative in construction and design-build negotiations and should be shown in the demo.
records.pushback_one_liner: Please revise this section to align with a balanced design-build benchmark rather than an aggressive downstream transfer of risk.

records.title: Multiple conditions precedent to payment
records.plain_english: Payment does not become due until multiple upstream, paperwork, or funding conditions are satisfied.
